allow: Bash(node -e "const p = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('deps:', JSON.stringify\(p.dependencies, null, 2\)\); console.log\('devDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.devDependencies, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/dexie/dist/dexie.d.ts','utf8'\); const lines=d.split\('\\n'\); const idx=lines.findIndex\(l=>l.includes\('tables'\)\); console.log\(lines.slice\(Math.max\(0,idx-2\), idx+5\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/dexie/dist/dexie.d.ts','utf8'\); const lines=d.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{ if\(l.match\(/^\\s+tables[\\s:!]/\)\) console.log\(i+1, l\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/dexie/dist/dexie.d.ts','utf8'\); const lines=d.split\('\\n'\); const start=lines.findIndex\(l=>l.match\(/^export declare class Dexie/\)\); lines.slice\(start,start+60\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(i+start+1,l\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/dexie/dist/dexie.d.ts','utf8'\); const lines=d.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{ if\(l.includes\('class Dexie'\)\) console.log\(i+1,l\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/dexie/dist/dexie.d.ts','utf8'\); const m=d.match\(/export\\s+\\{[^}]+\\}/s\); if\(m\) console.log\(m[0].substring\(0,2000\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/dexie/dist/dexie.d.ts','utf8'\); const idx=d.indexOf\('declare class Dexie'\); if\(idx>=0\) console.log\(d.substring\(idx, idx+2500\)\)")
